purpose: Re-elicit the coarse-rating cohorts (the 4 Sonnet panel-* raters and the 16 Haiku cheap-* raters) blind at tenths resolution over their original live assignments; same agent ids, same blocs (panel-*=b1, cheap-*=cheap), same era -> supersede in place.

note: Fine-grained (finer-than-half) ratings across the whole graph rose ~30% -> 77%. No lifecycle state changed (18 contested / 49 settled). The fine-grained haiku-* presentation cohort and any refdense/ref raters were already at tenths and were left untouched.
